title: AWS S3 GetObject (REST-XML protocol, path-routed)
description: S3 uses the REST-XML protocol: operations are routed by URL path and HTTP method (GET /{bucket}/{key} for GetObject), unlike the query/JSON-protocol services above. Point the SDK at Lyrebird via AWS_ENDPOINT_URL and set UsePathStyle/ForcePathStyle so the bucket stays in the path rather than becoming a subdomain Lyrebird would never see.
